name: Chuang Yi Biotech co., ltd.
summary: Chuang Yi Biotech Co., ltd. engages in the research, development, and marketing of medicines and health foods in Taiwan. The company offers products in the areas of gastrointestinal, metabolism, and regular health care, as well as allergy reducing products. Chuang Yi Biotech Co., ltd. Swas founded in 2011 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
